title: aeschynanthus novogracilis
intro: Aeschynanthus novogracilis, also known as the Novogracilis Lipstick Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is a climbing epiphyte native to the tropical forests of the Philippines and Indonesia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems, due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Aeschynanthus novogracilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
